response.justification: Bogdan is a technically exceptional developer with strong expertise in testing infrastructure, CI/CD, and full-stack systems. However, the role requires 2 years of people management experience—a minimum bar this resume does not meet. His background shows only individual contributor work, including in 'Staff' roles that appear to be senior IC positions rather than management tracks. While his technical knowledge aligns partially with developer tools and testing productivity, the absence of any demonstrated experience managing people, conducting performance reviews, or leading teams makes him fundamentally unqualified for a mid-to-senior management role.
strengths: Deep expertise in testing infrastructure, frameworks, and test automation (Fluent-Asserts, Trial, Selenium training)
Proven ability to mentor and teach through workshops, code dojos, and formal training programs
Exceptional technical breadth across multiple languages, platforms, and domains (web, mobile, embedded, distributed systems)
concerns: Zero demonstrated experience managing people, conducting one-on-ones, or providing performance feedback
Career trajectory is entirely individual-contributor focused with no evidence of organizational or team-level responsibility
Limited exposure to large-scale build systems, compiler infrastructure, or mobile platform ecosystem challenges
